Tip of the day
Being overencumbered only slows down your activities, but doesn't affect travel.

Amulet of shrimp
(Eternal)

Bankable:     Droppable:

A shining amulet with the power of a shrimp.

The Amulet of shrimp item is a crafted item.

Requirement

  • At least Foraging lvl. 35.

Attributes

Quality Attributes

+6% Chest finding While doing Foraging.
+10% Fine material finding While doing Foraging.
+1% Double rewards While doing Foraging.
Global +25% Find collectibles

+9% Chest finding While doing Foraging.
+15% Fine material finding While doing Foraging.
+1.5% Double rewards While doing Foraging.
-1 Steps required While doing Foraging.
Global +25% Find collectibles

+12% Chest finding While doing Foraging.
+20% Fine material finding While doing Foraging.
+2% Double rewards While doing Foraging.
-1 Steps required While doing Foraging.
Global +25% Find collectibles

+15% Chest finding While doing Foraging.
+25% Fine material finding While doing Foraging.
+2.5% Double rewards While doing Foraging.
-2 Steps required While doing Foraging.
Global +25% Find collectibles

+18% Chest finding While doing Foraging.
+30% Fine material finding While doing Foraging.
+3% Double rewards While doing Foraging.
-2 Steps required While doing Foraging.
Global +25% Find collectibles

+21% Chest finding While doing Foraging.
+35% Fine material finding While doing Foraging.
+3.5% Double rewards While doing Foraging.
-3 Steps required While doing Foraging.
Global +25% Find collectibles

Uses

This item may be equipped to your character.

Sources

Primary Recipe Output

Create an amulet of shrimp

You fit the shrimp trinket into the golden and silver amulet, making a perfect fit. It takes time, but the result looks useful for foraging.

Place a shrimp trinket into an amulet.

Recipe Outputs
Recipe Name Level Service
Requirement 		Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Create an amulet of shrimp Trinketry lvl. 45 Needs Basic Trinketry Bench service or better. 1x Shrimp trinket
1x Gold bar
1x Silver bar		 1x Amulet of shrimp
Recipe Experience
Recipe Name Base
XP 		Base
Steps 		Base
XP/Step 		Minimum
Steps 		Max
Work Efficiency 		Max
XP/Step 		Full Recipe
W.E.A.R.
Create an amulet of shrimp 7502 5000 1.500 2500 steps 200% 3.001 111,498 steps
Additional Recipe Outputs
Item Name Item Type Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.
Trinketry chest Container 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 1,250,000 steps 625,000 steps

Crafting Flow

Shrimp trinket
x1

Trinketry
Amulet of shrimp
x1
 
Gold Bar/Recipe
Need: x1
 
Silver Bar/Recipe
Need: x1
Raw Materials
1x Shrimp trinket
2x Gold ore or 7x Gold nugget
7x Silver nugget or 2x Silver ore
